checks.description: When a write enable with address A and data D occurs, a subsequent read enable with the same address A must eventually produce D on rdata.
checks.pass_condition: If renc is asserted and raddr equals the most recent waddr where wenc was asserted, then rdata must eventually equal the corresponding wdata value, or may remain unknown/hi-z if not yet resolved.
checks.trigger_condition: On each occurrence of wenc=1 followed later by renc=1 with matching address.
